title: Short PvP Swords 1.6+
body:
**remember even it shows warnings like For Newer or Older version it will still works fine**
# 🗡️ Clean PvP Swords
**Short sword textures for clear screen PvP. Perfect for Sword PvP, UHC, and Bedwars.**

---

## 📦 About this Pack

This pack replaces all sword textures with minimal, short versions – ideal for PvP players who want a clean screen and better visibility during fights.

**✅ Includes:**
- Wooden, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond & Netherite short swords  
- Consistent pixel art style      
- No extra GUI changes  
- Lightweight – great for low-end PCs

---

## ⚔️ Recommended For
- Crystal PvP  
- UHC / KitPvP  
- FPS gameplay  
- Clean screen texture setups

---

## ⚠️ Compatibility Note

- Tested on **Vanilla Minecraft Only** 
- Not Tested with Mods

---


## 🏷️ Tags

`#pvp` `#fps` `#short-swords` `#clean-ui` `#1.21` `#resource-pack` `#low-fire` `#minecraft-texture`
